To Titus<S>5103</S>, mine own<S>1103</S> son<S>5043</S> after<S>2596</S> the common<S>2839</S> faith<S>4102</S>: Grace<S>5485</S>, mercy<S>1656</S>, and peace<S>1515</S>, from<S>575</S> God<S>2316</S> the Father<S>3962</S> and<S>2532</S> the Lord<S>2962</S> Jesus<S>2424</S> Christ<S>5547</S> our<S>2257</S> Saviour<S>4990</S>.

If any<S>1536</S> be<S>2076</S> blameless<S>410</S>, the husband<S>435</S> of one<S>3391</S> wife<S>1135</S>, having<S>2192</S> faithful<S>4103</S> children<S>5043</S> not<S>3361</S> accused<S>1722</S> <S>2724</S> of riot<S>810</S> or<S>2228</S> unruly<S>506</S>.

But<S>235</S> a lover of hospitality<S>5382</S>, a lover of good men<S>5358</S>, sober<S>4998</S>, just<S>1342</S>, holy<S>3741</S>, temperate<S>1468</S>; <sup>men: or, things</sup>

Holding fast<S>472</S> the faithful<S>4103</S> word<S>3056</S> as<S>2596</S> he hath been taught<S>1322</S>, that<S>2443</S> he may be<S>5600</S> able<S>1415</S> by<S>1722</S> sound<S>5198</S> doctrine<S>1319</S> both<S>2532</S> to exhort<S>3870</S> and<S>2532</S> to convince<S>1651</S> the gainsayers<S>483</S>. <sup>as: or, in teaching</sup>

For<S>1063</S> there are<S>1526</S> many<S>4183</S> unruly<S>506</S> and<S>2532</S> vain talkers<S>3151</S> and<S>2532</S> deceivers<S>5423</S>, specially<S>3122</S> they of<S>1537</S> the circumcision<S>4061</S>:

Whose<S>3739</S> mouths<S>1993</S> must<S>1163</S> be stopped<S>1993</S>, who<S>3748</S> subvert<S>396</S> whole<S>3650</S> houses<S>3624</S>, teaching<S>1321</S> things which<S>3739</S> they ought<S>1163</S> not<S>3361</S>, for<S>5484</S> filthy<S>150</S> lucre's<S>2771</S> sake<S>5484</S>.

One<S>5100</S> of<S>1537</S> themselves<S>846</S>, even a prophet<S>4396</S> of their<S>846</S> own<S>2398</S>, said<S>2036</S>, The Cretians<S>2912</S> are alway<S>104</S> liars<S>5583</S>, evil<S>2556</S> beasts<S>2342</S>, slow<S>692</S> bellies<S>1064</S>.

This<S>3778</S> witness<S>3141</S> is<S>2076</S> true<S>227</S>. Wherefore<S>1223</S> <S>3739</S> <S>156</S> rebuke<S>1651</S> them<S>846</S> sharply<S>664</S>, that<S>2443</S> they may be sound<S>5198</S> in<S>1722</S> the faith<S>4102</S>;
Not<S>3361</S> giving heed<S>4337</S> to Jewish<S>2451</S> fables<S>3454</S>, and<S>2532</S> commandments<S>1785</S> of men<S>444</S>, that turn from<S>654</S> the truth<S>225</S>.

Unto the pure<S>2513</S> all things<S>3956</S> are pure<S>3303</S> <S>2513</S>: but<S>1161</S> unto them that are defiled<S>3392</S> and<S>2532</S> unbelieving<S>571</S> is nothing<S>3762</S> pure<S>2513</S>; but<S>235</S> even<S>2532</S> their<S>846</S> mind<S>3563</S> and<S>2532</S> conscience<S>4893</S> is defiled<S>3392</S>.

They profess<S>3670</S> that they know<S>1492</S> God<S>2316</S>; but<S>1161</S> in works<S>2041</S> they deny<S>720</S> him, being<S>5607</S> abominable<S>947</S>, and<S>2532</S> disobedient<S>545</S>, and<S>2532</S> unto<S>4314</S> every<S>3956</S> good<S>18</S> work<S>2041</S> reprobate<S>96</S>. <sup>reprobate: or, void of judgment</sup>

2.text: But<S>1161</S> speak<S>2980</S> thou<S>4771</S> the things which<S>3739</S> become<S>4241</S> sound<S>5198</S> doctrine<S>1319</S>:

That the aged men<S>4246</S> be<S>1511</S> sober<S>3524</S>, grave<S>4586</S>, temperate<S>4998</S>, sound<S>5198</S> in faith<S>4102</S>, in charity<S>26</S>, in patience<S>5281</S>. <sup>sober: or, vigilant</sup>

The aged women<S>4247</S> likewise<S>5615</S>, that they be in<S>1722</S> behaviour<S>2688</S> as becometh holiness<S>2412</S>, not<S>3361</S> false accusers<S>1228</S>, not<S>3361</S> given<S>1402</S> to much<S>4183</S> wine<S>3631</S>, teachers of good things<S>2567</S>; <sup>holiness: or, holy women</sup> <sup>false: or, one who foments strife</sup>

That<S>2443</S> they may teach<S>4994</S> the young women<S>3501</S> to be<S>1511</S> sober<S>4994</S>, to love their husbands<S>5362</S>, to love their children<S>5388</S>, <sup>sober: or, wise</sup>

To be discreet<S>4998</S>, chaste<S>53</S>, keepers at home<S>3626</S>, good<S>18</S>, obedient<S>5293</S> to their own<S>2398</S> husbands<S>435</S>, that<S>3363</S> the word<S>3056</S> of God<S>2316</S> be<S>987</S> not<S>3363</S> blasphemed<S>987</S>.
Young men<S>3501</S> likewise<S>5615</S> exhort<S>3870</S> to be sober minded<S>4993</S>. <sup>sober: or, discreet</sup>

In<S>4012</S> all things<S>3956</S> shewing<S>3930</S> thyself<S>4572</S> a pattern<S>5179</S> of good<S>2570</S> works<S>2041</S>: in<S>1722</S> doctrine<S>1319</S> shewing uncorruptness<S>90</S>, gravity<S>4587</S>, sincerity<S>861</S>,

Sound<S>5199</S> speech<S>3056</S>, that cannot be condemned<S>176</S>; that<S>2443</S> he that is of<S>1537</S> the contrary part<S>1727</S> may be ashamed<S>1788</S>, having<S>2192</S> no<S>3367</S> evil<S>5337</S> thing<S>3367</S> to say<S>3004</S> of<S>4012</S> you<S>5216</S>.

Exhort servants<S>1401</S> to be obedient<S>5293</S> unto their own<S>2398</S> masters<S>1203</S>, and to<S>1511</S> please them well<S>2101</S> in<S>1722</S> all<S>3956</S> things; not<S>3361</S> answering again<S>483</S>; <sup>answering: or, gainsaying</sup>

Not<S>3361</S> purloining<S>3557</S>, but<S>235</S> shewing<S>1731</S> all<S>3956</S> good<S>18</S> fidelity<S>4102</S>; that<S>2443</S> they may adorn<S>2885</S> the doctrine<S>1319</S> of God<S>2316</S> our<S>2257</S> Saviour<S>4990</S> in<S>1722</S> all things<S>3956</S>.
For<S>1063</S> the grace<S>5485</S> of God<S>2316</S> that bringeth salvation<S>4992</S> hath appeared<S>2014</S> to all<S>3956</S> men<S>444</S>, <sup>hath: or, to all men, hath appeared</sup>

Teaching<S>3811</S> us<S>2248</S> that<S>2443</S>, denying<S>720</S> ungodliness<S>763</S> and<S>2532</S> worldly<S>2886</S> lusts<S>1939</S>, we should live<S>2198</S> soberly<S>4996</S>,<S>2532</S> righteously<S>1346</S>, and<S>2532</S> godly<S>2153</S>, in<S>1722</S> this present<S>3568</S> world<S>165</S>;

Looking for<S>4327</S> that blessed<S>3107</S> hope<S>1680</S>, and<S>2532</S> the glorious<S>1391</S> appearing<S>2015</S> of the great<S>3173</S> God<S>2316</S> and<S>2532</S> our<S>2257</S> Saviour<S>4990</S> Jesus<S>2424</S> Christ<S>5547</S>; <sup>glorious: Gr. the appearance of the glory of the great God, and of our Saviour Jesus Christ</sup>

Who<S>3739</S> gave<S>1325</S> himself<S>1438</S> for<S>5228</S> us<S>2257</S>, that<S>2443</S> he might redeem<S>3084</S> us<S>2248</S> from<S>575</S> all<S>3956</S> iniquity<S>458</S>, and<S>2532</S> purify<S>2511</S> unto himself<S>1438</S> a peculiar<S>4041</S> people<S>2992</S>, zealous<S>2207</S> of good<S>2570</S> works<S>2041</S>.

3.text: Put<S>5279</S> them<S>846</S> in mind<S>5279</S> to be subject<S>5293</S> to principalities<S>746</S> and<S>2532</S> powers<S>1849</S>, to obey magistrates<S>3980</S>, to be<S>1511</S> ready<S>2092</S> to<S>4314</S> every<S>3956</S> good<S>18</S> work<S>2041</S>,

To speak evil of<S>987</S> no man<S>3367</S>, to be<S>1511</S> no brawlers<S>269</S>, but gentle<S>1933</S>, shewing<S>1731</S> all<S>3956</S> meekness<S>4236</S> unto<S>4314</S> all<S>3956</S> men<S>444</S>.

But<S>1161</S> after<S>3753</S> that the kindness<S>5544</S> and<S>2532</S> love<S>5363</S> of God<S>2316</S> our<S>2257</S> Saviour<S>4990</S> toward man<S>5363</S> appeared<S>2014</S>, <sup>love: or, pity</sup>

Not<S>3756</S> by<S>1537</S> works<S>2041</S> of<S>1722</S> righteousness<S>1343</S> which<S>3739</S> we<S>2249</S> have done<S>4160</S>, but<S>235</S> according to<S>2596</S> his<S>846</S> mercy<S>1656</S> he saved<S>4982</S> us<S>2248</S>, by<S>1223</S> the washing<S>3067</S> of regeneration<S>3824</S>, and<S>2532</S> renewing<S>342</S> of the Holy<S>40</S> Ghost<S>4151</S>;

That<S>2443</S> being justified by<S>1344</S> his<S>1565</S> grace<S>5485</S>, we should be made<S>1096</S> heirs<S>2818</S> according to<S>2596</S> the hope<S>1680</S> of eternal<S>166</S> life<S>2222</S>.

This is a faithful<S>4103</S> saying<S>3056</S>, and<S>2532</S> these things<S>4012</S> <S>5130</S> I will<S>1014</S> that thou<S>4571</S> affirm constantly<S>1226</S>, that<S>2443</S> they which have believed<S>4100</S> in God<S>2316</S> might be careful<S>5431</S> to maintain<S>4291</S> good<S>2570</S> works<S>2041</S>. These things<S>5023</S> are<S>2076</S> good<S>2570</S> and<S>2532</S> profitable<S>5624</S> unto men<S>444</S>.

But<S>1161</S> avoid<S>4026</S> foolish<S>3474</S> questions<S>2214</S>, and<S>2532</S> genealogies<S>1076</S>, and<S>2532</S> contentions<S>2054</S>, and<S>2532</S> strivings about<S>3163</S> the law<S>3544</S>; for<S>1063</S> they are<S>1526</S> unprofitable<S>512</S> and<S>2532</S> vain<S>3152</S>.
A man<S>444</S> that is an heretick<S>141</S> after<S>3326</S> the first<S>3391</S> and<S>2532</S> second<S>1208</S> admonition<S>3559</S> reject<S>3868</S>;
Knowing<S>1492</S> that<S>3754</S> he that is such<S>5108</S> is subverted<S>1612</S>, and<S>2532</S> sinneth<S>264</S>, being<S>5607</S> condemned of himself<S>843</S>.

When<S>3752</S> I shall send<S>3992</S> Artemas<S>734</S> unto<S>4314</S> thee<S>4571</S>, or<S>2228</S> Tychicus<S>5190</S>, be diligent<S>4704</S> to come<S>2064</S> unto<S>4314</S> me<S>3165</S> to<S>1519</S> Nicopolis<S>3533</S>: for<S>1063</S> I have determined<S>2919</S> there<S>1563</S> to winter<S>3914</S>.

And<S>1161</S> let<S>3129</S> ours<S>2251</S> also<S>2532</S> learn<S>3129</S> to maintain<S>4291</S> good<S>2570</S> works<S>2041</S> for<S>1519</S> necessary<S>316</S> uses<S>5532</S>, that<S>3363</S> they be<S>5600</S> not<S>3363</S> unfruitful<S>175</S>. <sup>maintain: or, profess honest trades</sup>

All<S>3956</S> that are with<S>3326</S> me<S>1700</S> salute<S>782</S> thee<S>4571</S>. Greet<S>782</S> them that love<S>5368</S> us<S>2248</S> in<S>1722</S> the faith<S>4102</S>. Grace<S>5485</S> be with<S>3326</S> you<S>5216</S> all<S>3956</S>.
